title: Fresh Fragrant Dutch Feta Salad
description: A refreshing and healthy Dutch salad featuring cubed feta cheese, perfect for a midnight craving, with a grassy and velvety texture, and diabetic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and red onion.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and olive oil.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
In a separate bowl, combine the cubed feta cheese and chopped parsley.
Add the feta cheese mixture to the salad and toss gently.
Season the salad with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the salad chilled, straight from the refrigerator.
For an extra burst of flavor, try adding a squeeze of fresh lemon juice just before serving.
